Off Calendar Oct-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter despite a hearing was required. The court ruled as follows:
Defendant Jason W. Heard's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Granted. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/hk
